title: Re-creating repeating tasks
excerpt: On another platform I used previously, I could set an individual task to automatically recreate/repeat every 2 weeks, 1 month, etc. When I changed the status to DONE, the task would automatically repopulate on my calenda…

posts.author: JenZucconi (Jennifer Zucconi)
posts.cookedHtml:
On another platform I used previously, I could set an individual task to automatically recreate/repeat every 2 weeks, 1 month, etc. When I changed the status to DONE, the task would automatically repopulate on my calendar that many weeks/months later.

Please make this possible in Monday!!! Currently, for a regularly repeating task we have to set up a whole new automation, often with multiple steps for this simple reoccurrence. Would really appreciate this feature, and from the years worth of comments and requests in the Community, I know many others would as well!

Thank you!
~ Jennifer
